rationale: Israel's continued strikes on Lebanon despite a potential US-Iran deal keep energy price uncertainty alive for Poland, while the AI/Anthropic story has minor indirect relevance; no qualitative change in Ukraine war.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as US-Iran deal said to be near
top_events.summary: Ongoing Lebanon strikes amid Iran deal talks keep Middle East energy risk elevated. For Poland, this sustains indirect pressure on gas/oil prices and EU energy security without a new escalation.

top_events.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US federal AI restrictions on foreign nationals could affect Polish tech sector access to US AI tools, a mild but new indirect signal of tightening tech decoupling.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues
top_events.summary: No qualitative change on the front; war remains background reality for Poland with no new escalation this cycle.
